use_cases: Display team member photos in an interactive stacked layout on company about pages
Showcase product images in a visually engaging gallery on e-commerce product pages
Create dynamic testimonial sections with author profile photos
Build portfolio or project showcases with overlapping image cards
Add interactive media grids to landing pages or hero sections
ai_summary: An interactive photo stack component that displays up to 5 photos in a randomized overlapping arrangement. On hover, photos spread apart revealing all items beneath; clicking a photo brings it to the front. Uses non-overlapping collision detection to generate random translate and rotate transforms for a natural scattered look. Ideal for showcasing teams, products, or testimonials in an engaging visual format.
